name: Ecosia
description: Privacy-conscious search engine that uses its ad revenue to fund tree-planting projects worldwide.

years.notes: Globe symbol with orange ring and teal sun-ray leaves; introduced circa 2018 with Ecosia's flat icon refresh. Rebuilt as geometric SVG from 512×512 PNG raster reference.
2022 Koto rebrand: tree silhouette with 'E' monogram cut through the trunk on a lime-green rounded-square background.
